Menus | The Dirty Tea in Atlanta, GA
Main content starts here, tab to start navigating
Menus
Afternoon Tea Menu
Join us at The Dirty Tea Atlanta for a Delightful Afternoon Tea Experience!
Indulge in an enchanting afternoon surrounded by beautiful China, exquisite teas, and a delightful array of small sandwiches and pastries.
The Afternoon Tea Experience includes:
Your choice of teas
A splendid dessert tower(s) featuring an assortment of tea sandwiches and delectable desserts
Cost: $95.00 per person (excluding service charge and applicable taxes)
Deposit: $25 per person for parties of 6 or less and $50 per person for parties of 7 or more (deducted from the final cost, non-refundable, and non-transferable)
Reserve your spot today and savor the elegance and charm of our afternoon tea.
*Dietary Restrictions and Food Allergy Notice:
Please be aware that food and beverages prepared at our establishment may contain milk, eggs, wheat, soybeans, nuts, and fish. We do not allow outside food to be brought onto the premises.
We do
not
offer vegan options.
*If you have any dietary restrictions or food allergies, please inform us at least 48 hours prior to your reservation.
Seasonal Menu:
Our menu items are thoughtfully curated based on seasonal availability and may change accordingly to ensure the freshest and finest ingredients.
Teas
(Your selection of teas are included in the Afternoon Tea Experience)
Apple Spice (seasonal)
Herbal tea blended with cinnamon, ginger, apple pieces, hibiscus, cornflower petals, stevia, clove, cardamom, and black pepper.
Black Creme Brulee
Our customer's favorite! A black Ceylon tea blended with sweet creme brulee.
Black and Green Exotic Fruits
Blended black and green tea base with orange peel, rose petals, safflowers, and marigold petals with an exotic oriental jackfruit flavor.
Black Peach Apricot
Fruity black tea blended with peaches and apricot.
Blue Butterfly Tea
Herbal tea blend with dried blue pea flowers.
Chamomile
Herbal tea blend made with dried flowers from the chamomile plant.
Earl Grey
A blend of black tea leaves and bergamot essential oil.
Green Moroccan Mint
Our blend of gunpowder green tea and spearmint.
Green Yerba Mate
Herbal tea blend made with dried leaves from the yerba mate plant.
Herbal Tulsi Ginger
Herbal tea blend with tulsi (holy basil) and ginger.
Oolong White
A tea blend of dried oolong leaves with downy white tips.
Passion Hibiscus
Herbal tea blended with apple, hibiscus, rose hips, berries, cinnamon, cloves, oranges and natural orange flavor.
Rooibos Hawaiian Colada
Rooibos tea blended with coconut and pineapple pieces.
Rooibos Masala Chai
Rooibos tea blended with cinnamon, cardamom, ginger, and vanilla.
White Georgia Peach
Our customer's favorite! A white tea blend with peach pieces and peach flavor.
White Ginger Orange Peach
A white tea blend with ginger root, orange peel, peach pieces, marigold, and ginger orange peach flavor.
White Christmas (seasonal)
White tea (Pai Mu Tan) blended with apple pieces, hibiscus blossoms, sliced almonds, cinnamon pieces, cinnamon rods, mistletoe, rose petals.
Coffee
(Not included in the Afternoon Tea Experience)
Single Espresso
Double Espresso
Macchiato (European)
Americano
Cappuccino
Cafe Latte
Served hot or iced.
Designer Latte
Latte made with a cinnamon flavored pattern or design on top.
Mocha Latte
Latte made with a mocha powder. Served hot or iced.
Dirty Chai Latte
Latte made with two shots of espresso and chai powder. Served hot or iced.
Sandwiches
(Included in the Afternoon Tea Experience)
Cucumber
Comes on an artesian bread with dill cream cheese with sliced cucumber.
vegetarian
Chicken Salad
Comes on an artesian bread with a mayo-based chicken salad blended with walnuts and cranberries.
nuts, peanut, tree nut
Smoked Salmon
Comes on a slice of rye bread with a garlic aioli cream cheese spread and garnished with sliced lemon.
fish, raw
Pastries
(Included in the Afternoon Tea Experience, some pastries will vary and are seasonal on dessert towers)
Macaron
French macarons is a sweet meringue-based confection made with egg white, icing sugar, granulated sugar, almond meal. (Please ask kitchen for daily flavors offered)
gluten free
Strawberry Croissant
French pastry made from puff pastry in a crescent shape with fresh strawberries and fresh whipped
cream sandwiched in the middle.
Powdered Almond Cookie
Made from a mixture of butter, powdered sugar, flour, and finely chopped nuts, (often walnuts or pecans)
Cranberry Scone
a traditional British baked good, popular in the United Kingdom and Ireland made of wheat flour with baking powder as a leavening agent and cranberries.
Tiramisu Tort
Chocolate cake topped with chocolate mousse with layers of roulade soaked with espresso rum syrup
topped with mascarpone mousse and a disc of almond joconde sprinkled with shaved chocolate.
Raspberry Shortbread Cookie
Shortbread cookie with raspberry filling
Chocolate Louise
Rich chocolate cake topped with silky smooth chocolate hazelnut cream.
Cheesecake
Mini cheesecake garnished with a raspberry layered on top of a graham cracker crust.
Lemon Curd
Zesty tart lemon flavored cheesecake with a graham cracker crust.
Raspberry Cheesecake
Cheesecake mixed with a raspberry puree garnished with shaved white chocolate and a raspberry layered on top of a graham cracker crust.
Strawberry Fields
Layered strawberry mousse, baked cheesecake, and almond cake topped with raspberry coulis and white chocolate slices and raspberry dust.
Lemon Bliss
Lemon mousse with mascarpone, a lemon curd insert and pistachio cake sitting on a lemon Brenton shortbread.
Fruit Tart
Shortbread crust with a hint of raspberry preserves and pastry cream topped with fresh seasonal berries and fruit.
Banana Pudding (Seasonal)
Vanilla custard blended with fresh cream and fresh bananas garnished with shortbread cookies.
Cocktails
(Not included in the Afternoon Tea Experience)
Espresso Martini
Irish cream whiskey | Reposado tequila | Espresso
Lemon Drop Mojito
Vodka | Elderflower liqueur | Fresh mint leaves | lemon juice | pineapple juice | Agave
Sidecar
Cognac | Orange Liqueur | Lemon juice | Agave
French 75
Bubbles | Gin | Lemon juice | Agave
Mimosa
Bubbles | Orange juice
Lemon Drop Martini
Vodka | Lemon juice | Agave
Peach Paloma Spritzer
Tequila | Peach purée | Lime juice | Grapefruit infused tonic water | Topped with Prosecco
Bottle Service Available
